Summer Internship Program 2026 – MCA Approved | Stipend up to ₹15,000 | Apply Now
Spam

to goudvenu047, bcc: me

Why is this message in spam? This message is similar to messages that were identified as spam in the past.
Report not spam
Dear Students,

We are pleased to inform you that Summer Internship Program applications are now open through the AICTE Portal for MNC stipend-based opportunities, specially designed for the upcoming summer break.

Students interested in a Work From Home Summer Internship with a stipend ranging from ₹8,000 to ₹15,000 are encouraged to apply. This program enables you to gain valuable industry experience while productively utilizing your summer vacation.

This internship program is certified and approved by the All India Council for Technical Education (AICTE), the Ministry of Corporate Affairs (MCA), and Startup India.

 How to Get Placed in College – A Simple Formula
Placement is not about luck, it’s about preparation.

Step 1: Build Skills
Learn both technical and communication skills. Practice regularly and work on small projects to strengthen your knowledge.

Step 2: Get Certifications
Choose relevant certifications in your domain. Certifications help validate your skills and make your resume stronger.

Step 3: Gain Experience
Participate in internships, live projects, or freelancing. Real-world experience builds confidence and impresses recruiters.

 Add-On Benefits
Internship Completion Certificate
(Approved by Govt. of India – MCA & Startup India)

Industrial Training Certificate
(Approved by Govt. of India – MCA & Startup India)

Letter of Recommendation (LOR)
(Approved by Govt. of India – MCA & Startup India)

 Key Benefits of the Internship
Learn how to build a professional resume

Gain real industry experience

Work on real-time live industry projects

Improve placement readiness through practical exposure

Earn AICTE credit points (certificate to be submitted to the college)

Receive a Letter of Recommendation for future job opportunities

 Check Your Eligibility & Apply Here
https://forms.gle/wHupz7yBPQi2yVNT8

Referral Code: SUM@INT

Remember:
 Degree gives eligibility.
 Skills create opportunity.
 Experience leads to placement.

Note: We kindly request you to share the above link and referral code in your respective class groups, as some students may not regularly check their emails.

Best Regards,
HR Department.
